Requirements on SW -C and System Modeling  
AUTOSAR CP Release 4.4.0   
4 of 21 Document ID 267: AUTOSAR_RS_SWCModeling  
- AUTOSAR confidential - 
Table of Contents  
1 Scope of Document  :  :  :   6 
1.1 Terminology  :  :  :   6 
2 Conventions to be used  :  :  :   7 
3 Acronyms and Abbreviation s:  :  :   8 
4 Naming Convention Requirements  :  :  .... 9

model elements of type ARElement  :  :   9

element  :  :  :  .... 9 
4.3 [RS_ SWMG_00005] Easy creation of names  :  :   10

element suppliers  :  :  :   10 
4.6 [RS_SWMG_00010] Model Element  Names shall follow semantic 
rules  :  :  :  :  11 
4.7 [RS_SWMG_00011] Model Element  Names are composed by 
arranging standardized keywords  :  :   11 
4.8 [RS_SWMG_00012] Se mantic of Model Element  Names  shall allow 
variable number of keywords  :  :  . 11 
4.9 [RS_SWMG_00014] Length restriction for short names  of Identifiable  .. 12 
4.10  [RS_SWMG_00016] Names shall allow to indicate if the value is a 
direct measurement or a conditioned val ue :  :   12 
4.11  [RS_SWMG_00017] Names shall follow the ISO 8855 for English 
naming.  :  :  :  .. 12 
4.12  [RS_SWMG_00030] Use English as Standard Language for Names.  .. 13 
4.13  [RS_SWMG_00031] No Architectural Information in Names  :   13 
4.14  [RS_SWMG_00034] Usage of Unique Keywords  :  .. 13 
4.15  [RS_SWMG_00039] Avoid usage of Trailing underscores  :   14 
4.16  [RS_SWMG_00040] Avoid sequences of underscores characters.  :  14 
4.17  [RS_SWMG_00041] Do not rely on uppercase/lowercase difference 
only.  :  :  :  :  14 
4.18  [RS_SWMG_00048] Easy lookup of names in databases  :   14 
4.19  [RS_SWMG_00049] Support Identifiable already present in the 
MasterTable  :  :  :   15 
4.20  [RS_SWMG_00054] Provide guidelines how to resolve name conflicts  15 
4.21  [RS_SWMG_00059] There sha ll be a single set of keywords  :   15 
4.22  [RS_SWMG_00060] Applicability of Naming Convention  :   16 
4.23  [RS_SWMG_00061] Naming convention shall be unique  :   16 
4.24  [RS_SWMG_00062] Naming Convention shall rule Short Names and 
Long Names construction.  :  :  :  17 
5 Modeling Requirements  :  :  :   19 
5.1 [RS_SWMG_00052] Definition of Package Structure  :   19 
5.2 [RS_SWMG_00053] Model shall be compliant to the Meta Model  :   19 
5.3 [RS_SWMG_00055] Continuous Data Type resolution should be a 
power of two  :  :  :   19 Requirements on SW -C and System Modeling

methodology  :  :  :   20
